Executive Team

Senior industry experts with rich management experience

Zhang Minghua

Chairman & CEO

Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering, Tsinghua University
20 years in new energy industry

Former member of National Energy Administration Expert Committee, led multiple large-scale new energy projects.

Li Jianguo

Chief Technology Officer

M.S. in Power Systems, North China Electric Power University
15 years wind power technology R&D

Senior power engineering expert, completed 50+ wind and solar projects.

Wang Yaqin

Chief Operating Officer

MBA, Peking University
12 years new energy project operation management

Expert in full lifecycle project management, led multiple billion-yuan new energy projects.

Chen Xiaoyan

Chief Financial Officer

M.S. in Accounting, Shanghai University of Finance and Economics
10 years energy industry financial management, CPA certified

Expert in new energy investment and financing, led multiple rounds of financing and IPO preparation.
